owner_source: Official AAA Tree Experts team/project-manager pages with BBB business-management corroboration
source_query: Charlotte NC landscaping public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found website, phone, public contact email, contact path, and estimate language. Official AAA Tree Experts homepage/team section identifies De Nourse as owner, with Heather Nelson as office manager, Greg Keller as project manager, and Mark Ropko as general manager. Official project-managers page identifies De Nourse as owner/project manager, says he has been with AAA Tree Experts since 2012, and lists 8120 England Street, Charlotte NC 28273 plus phone 704-366-1134. BBB corroborates AAA Tree Experts / Triple A Tree Experts LLC, business started 01/01/1989, new ownership date 06/30/2025, LLC incorporated 12/03/2024, and lists Heather Nelson office manager, DeAllen Nourse Jr. president, and Jennifer Nourse vice president. Official contact page lists phone 704-366-1134, mail@gmail.com, and Charlotte office addresses.
visible_gap: Owner and contact evidence are strong, but public contact path uses a generic Gmail and multiple office/address mentions; improve estimate routing, branded email/contact trust, and storm/emergency conversion path clarity.
offer_angle: Tree-service estimate/contact routing cleanup for Charlotte owner-led arborist team
